description: SendCanary: revert a non-sending domain lockdown. Replaces strict DMARC p=reject + SPF '-all' with a monitoring posture (DMARC p=none, SPF '~all') so the domain can start sending email safely. Run this before configuring senders through SendCanary's normal setup flow; otherwise your authorized senders will be rejected at the apex. Aggregate reports keep flowing to your chosen ruaAddress so you still have visibility during the transition. SendCanary (https://sendcanary.com) is an email authentication platform that monitors DMARC reports, detects spoofing, and automates DNS remediation for domain owners.
variableDescription: ruaAddress: email address that will keep receiving DMARC aggregate reports during the transition (same address you used for the original lockdown works well, or point it at SendCanary's per-tenant address once set up).
